subject: media: usb: em28xx: Replace GFP_ATOMIC with GFP_KERNEL in em28xx_init_usb_xfer()
notes: POC mirrors em28xx_init_usb_xfer() with usb_submit_urb(..., GFP_ATOMIC) as the bug and GFP_KERNEL as the fix.
Verifier-v1 strict pass on first POC: F1.acq=0 F1.rel=0 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=4 F2.if=4 (using poc-for-verifier.c buggy-only slice vs seed-slice.c buggy slice).

Query is generic (Q6-compliant): no _buggy/_fixed suffix matching, no hardcoded paths; pattern = (call to GFP-API with GFP_ATOMIC) and (enclosing fn looks sleepable by name OR contains a sleeping primitive) and (no atomic cue earlier in the function).
Recognizes GFP_ATOMIC via MacroInvocation.getMacroName() so it survives preprocessing.
Compile + POC validation passed on iter 1; POC sha256 frozen and verified unchanged after Stage F.
